response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The reference JSON provided lyrics for the song 'Violet' by Ninomae Ina'nis. However, this clip only contains her spoken introduction before the sneak peek ends.
2. JSON Usage: Discarded the reference lyrics as the song is not performed in this preview clip. Manual transcription was performed for all spoken dialogue.
3. Timing & Pacing: The dialogue is timed precisely to the vocal cues. Included a subtitle entry for the prominent on-screen text at the end of the sneak peek.

subtitles.original: All right, so I'm gonna count down from three. Countdown with me, okay?
subtitles.english: All right, so I'm gonna count down from three. Countdown with me, okay?

subtitles.original: And then we'll switch into the new outfit for you guys to see.
subtitles.english: And then we'll switch into the new outfit for you guys to see.

subtitles.original: Ready? Give me a "one" if you're ready!
subtitles.english: Ready? Give me a "one" if you're ready!

subtitles.original: All right, all right, all right.
subtitles.english: All right, all right, all right.

subtitles.original: Thank you, thank you, thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you, thank you!

subtitles.original: All right, it's time to move on to the next song.
subtitles.english: All right, it's time to move on to the next song.

subtitles.original: And I think this song also fits the starry stage perfectly.
subtitles.english: And I think this song also fits the starry stage perfectly.

subtitles.original: No, not that one yet, but...
subtitles.english: No, not that one yet, but...

subtitles.original: ...this one is from one of my favorite franchises.
subtitles.english: ...this one is from one of my favorite franchises.

subtitles.original: So I hope you guys listen.
subtitles.english: So I hope you guys listen.

subtitles.original: Anyways, the song will fit the starry stage perfectly.
subtitles.english: Anyways, the song will fit the starry stage perfectly.

subtitles.original: 無料パートは終了いたしました。ご視聴ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: The sneak peek part of the show has ended. Thank you for watching.
